roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:60 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  18  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES COUNT 5 - ABSCONDING PURSUANT TO 1385PC - LACK OF EVIDENCE,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:02-08-14 /X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HEWILLBE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILLBE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON TUESDAY, MARCH 4, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMEDBY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFYTREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASUREAS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 90 DAYS OF TREATMENT,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
